samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="state_0" value="2'b00">State 0 description.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="state_1" value="2'b01">State 1 description.</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="state_2" value="2'b10">State 2 description.</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="data_lock" width_description="[7:0]" type="sequential_logic">Register to store the first valid input data.</reg>
        <reg id="flag" width_description="[1:0]" type="sequential_logic">Flag to indicate the state of the data input.</reg>
        <reg id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]" type="sequential_logic">Register to store the concatenated output data.</reg>
        <reg id="valid_out" width_description="[1:0]" type="sequential_logic">Register to store the output validity signal.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <case-item id="reset_state">
                <condition>!rst_n</condition>
                <action>
                    <assign id="data_out" value="16'b0"/>
                    <assign id="valid_out" value="1'b0"/>
                    <assign id="flag" value="2'b00"/>
                </action>
            </case-item>
            <case-item id="state_0">
                <condition>valid_in && flag == 2'b00</condition>
                <action>
                    <assign id="data_lock" value="data_in"/>
                    <assign id="flag" value="2'b01"/>
                </action>
            </case-item>
            <case-item id="state_1">
                <condition>valid_in && flag == 2'b01</condition>
                <action>
                    <assign id="data_out" value="{data_lock, data_in}"/>
                    <assign id="valid_out" value="1'b1"/>
                    <assign id="flag" value="2'b10"/>
                </action>
            </case-item>
            <case-item id="state_2">
                <condition>valid_in && flag == 2'b10</condition>
                <action>
                    <assign id="data_out" value="{data_lock, data_in}"/>
                    <assign id="valid_out" value="1'b1"/>
                    <assign id="flag" value="2'b01"/>
                </action>
            </case-item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
